IF NO APPEARANCE AT MARCH 9, 2011 PROGRESS REPORT HEARING, THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE CASE FOR 3 MONTHS FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT, AND THEREAFTER IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS FOR A TOTAL OF 12 MONTHS.
